title: (Bullish Signal) TFII, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on May 13, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that TFII's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 100 similar cases, 86 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 86%. Current price $89.42 is above $81.51 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 04/13/21 - 05/13/21, the price experienced a +19% Uptrend. During the week of 05/06/21 - 05/13/21, the stock enjoyed a +0.89% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/zuvenpjj74z61.png?width=1521&format=png&auto=webp&s=c64becc105be181c93f35244507456ccf093d24f

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for TFII just turned positive on April 22, 2021. Looking at past instances where TFII's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I.shows that in 7 of 8 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

Following a +1.72% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where TFII advanced for three days, in 81 of 89 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 86 of 100 cases where TFII Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 86%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/11172822-tfi-international-tfii-88-58-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-may-13-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
